prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Users report an internal compiler error (ICE) during trait method resolution. Find the Rust source files in rust-lang/rust that (1) collect candidate trait method implementations and (2) report ambiguous trait method errors.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the rust-systems fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Users report an internal compiler error (ICE) during trait method resolution. Find the Rust source files in rust-lang/rust that (1) collect candidate trait method implementations and (2) report ambiguous trait method errors.
